info.title: IEP – Medad REST API
info.summary: IEP REST API covering core DocTypes and webhook events
info.description: REST API for the IEP integration with the Medad system. Provides CRUD access to core academic DocTypes via the standard Frappe /api/resource pattern, plus outbound webhook event definitions.

get.description: Retrieve a list of Academic Level documents with optional filtering and pagination

parameters.name: fields
parameters.description: JSON array of fieldnames to include. Pass the value as a JSON-encoded list in the query string. example: ["name", "title", "status"]

parameters.name: filters
parameters.description: JSON array of filter conditions. Each condition is an array in the form [Doctype, field, operator, value]. Combine multiple conditions in a single outer array. example: [["User", "enabled", "=", 1], ["Class Enrollment", "course", "=", "ACC203"]]

parameters.name: order_by
parameters.description: Field to order by (add 'desc' for descending)

post.description: Create a new Academic Level document

get.description: Retrieve a specific Academic Level document by name

put.description: Update an existing Academic Level document

delete.description: Delete a specific Academic Level document

parameters.description: JSON array of filter conditions. Each condition is an array in the form [Doctype, field, operator, value]. Combine multiple conditions in a single outer array. example: [["User", "enabled", "=", 1], ["Class Enrollment", "course", "=", "ACC203"]]

parameters.name: order_by
parameters.description: Field to order by (add 'desc' for descending)

post.description: Create a new Translation document

get.description: Retrieve a specific Translation document by name

put.description: Update an existing Translation document

delete.description: Delete a specific Translation document

post.description: Triggered when a student record is created.
Triggered when an instructor record is created.
Triggered when an institution is created.
Triggered when a campus is created.
Triggered when a college-campus relation is created.
Triggered when a department-college-campus relation is created.
Triggered when an academic term is created.
Triggered when a course is created (basic payload).
Triggered when a class/course is created (complete payload).
Triggered when a student is enrolled in a class.
Triggered when an instructor is assigned to a class.

defaults.description: Enter default value fields (keys) and values. If you add multiple values for a field, the first one will be picked. These defaults are also used to set "match" permission rules. To see list of fields, go to "Customize Form". (Child Table: DefaultValue)

restrict_ip.description: Restrict user from this IP address only. Multiple IP addresses can be added by separating with commas. Also accepts partial IP addresses like (111.111.111)

login_after.description: Allow user to login only after this hour (0-24)

user_type.description: If the user has any role checked, then the user becomes a "System User". "System User" has access to the desktop (References: User Type)

login_before.description: Allow user to login only before this hour (0-24)

bypass_restrict_ip_check_if_2fa_enabled.description: If enabled,  user can login from any IP Address using Two Factor Auth, this can also be set for all users in System Settings

last_known_versions.description: Stores the JSON of last known versions of various installed apps. It is used to show release notes.
